a224-2.resolution: Ctxly recall API still returning HTTP 404. This is the 3rd+ audit tracking this issue (first flagged A#223, safeJson guard added via wq-939, monitored A#224 and A#225). Upstream Ctxly API issue — not actionable on our end. safeJson guard prevents crashes. Removing from monitoring cycle — the guard works and the API is upstream-dependent.
a224-2.metric_after: Still HTTP 404 at A#226. No change in 10+ sessions.
a224-2.note: Chronic upstream issue. Guard is effective. De-escalating from monitoring — if Ctxly comes back online, it will work automatically.
